svg.title: Comparison of messy versus clean taxonomy for ML URL hierarchy
svg.desc: Two side-by-side trees. Left shows messy taxonomy mixing techniques and algorithms at the same level. Right shows clean taxonomy with technique families at level 3 and algorithm-plus-dataset at level 4.
svg.text: Two ways to organize the ML domain — one breaks, one scales

g.text: Techniques and algorithms at the same level

svg.text: algorithm. So is SVM. So why are

or as its own /knn/ ? You’ll have
The structure has no spine. Every
new project forces a naming debate.
That’s technical debt at the URL layer.

g.text: Level 3 = problem family. Level 4 = specific demo.

svg.text: problem am I solving?” A finite,
